speaker: GOWER
text: Now our sands are almost run,

speaker: GOWER
text: More a little, and then dumb.

speaker: GOWER
text: This my last boon give me—

speaker: GOWER
text: For such kindness must relieve me—

speaker: GOWER
text: That you aptly will suppose

speaker: GOWER
text: What pageantry, what feats, what shows,

speaker: GOWER
text: What minstrelsy and pretty din

speaker: GOWER
text: The regent made in Mytilene

speaker: GOWER
text: To greet the King. So he thrived

speaker: GOWER
text: That he is promised to be wived

speaker: GOWER
text: To fair Marina, but in no wise

speaker: GOWER
text: Till he had done his sacrifice

speaker: GOWER
text: As Dian bade, whereto being bound,

speaker: GOWER
text: The interim, pray you, all confound.

speaker: GOWER
text: In feathered briefness sails are filled,

speaker: GOWER
text: And wishes fall out as they’re willed.

speaker: GOWER
text: At Ephesus the temple see

speaker: GOWER
text: Our king and all his company.

speaker: GOWER
text: That he can hither come so soon

speaker: GOWER
text: Is by your fancies’ thankful doom.
